title: Bulk Buffalo Shredded Chicken Base
description: Tender shredded chicken tossed in mild buffalo sauce, designed for batch cooking and easy reuse in wraps, bowls, sandwiches, and more.
instructions: Place chicken in a large pot or pan and cook until fully cooked (boil, bake, or pan cook).
Remove chicken and shred using two forks.
In the same pot, melt butter over low heat.
Add buffalo sauce, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and pepper.
Return shredded chicken to the pot and mix until evenly coated.
Simmer for 5–10 minutes to absorb flavor.
Let cool slightly and portion into containers.

storage.reheat_instructions: Reheat in microwave or skillet with a splash of water or extra sauce to maintain moisture.

batch_notes: Cook and shred all chicken at once for efficient prep.
Keep extra buffalo sauce separate to refresh flavor when reheating.
meal_variations: Buffalo chicken wraps with lettuce and ranch
